title: Bitfarms December 2024 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitfarms December 2024 operations update shows operational hashrate reached 12.8 EH/s, up 97% year-over-year. Energy efficiency improved 40% to 21 w/TH. Generated 2,914 BTC throughout 2024. Expanded operational capacity by 35% to 324 MW. December mining produced 211 BTC compared to 207 BTC in November. Generated approximately $639,200 daily based on year-end Bitcoin pricing of $94,000 per coin. Liquidity exceeded $145 million including roughly $60 million cash. Bitcoin treasury grew to 934 BTC valued at approximately $87.8 million. CEO Ben Gagnon noted 2024 was transformative year despite missing original growth targets. Pending Stronghold Digital Mining acquisition described as largest acquisition between two public companies in Bitcoin mining sector, remains on track for Q1 2025 closure. Deal positions company toward 1.6 GW expansion capacity with approximately 66% in U.S. Synthetic HODL program achieved 135% USD-denominated return since inception, generating approximately $18 million in trading profits before year-end position closures.
